evals.name: basic-claude-sync-local-wifi
evals.prompt: I want to watch my Claude Code session from my phone while I'm working. I'm on the same WiFi as my laptop. How do I set this up?
evals.expected_output: Provides the exact npx itwillsync claude command, explains the QR code flow (scan with phone camera, open in browser), and notes no app install is needed on the phone.

evals.name: tailscale-remote-aider-sync
evals.prompt: I'm running Aider on my home desktop and I'm heading out. I use Tailscale so I can reach my machine remotely. What's the command to get my Aider session accessible on my phone even when I'm not home?
evals.expected_output: Provides npx itwillsync aider --tailscale, explains that Tailscale mode uses the VPN IP so it works outside the home network, and optionally mentions the hub persists sessions in background.

evals.name: hub-management-check-sessions
evals.prompt: I've already got itwillsync running with a couple sessions. I opened a new terminal tab and I can't remember the URL to get back to the dashboard, and I also want to see how long my sessions have been alive. What commands do I run?
evals.expected_output: Gives both npx itwillsync hub info (for URL + QR) AND npx itwillsync hub status (for session uptime list), clearly distinguishing what each does.
